basic_details.job_title: CSIR CFTRI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI)
basic_details.short_information: Central Food Technological Research Institute (CSIR CFTRI) has officially released a notification for the recruitment of 1 Project Assistant Posts. This recruitment drive offers a great opportunity for candidates looking for research jobs. Interested and eligible candidates can apply online through the official website.

application_fee.all_categories_fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

age_limit.age_details: Max: 35 years (Relaxation for SC/ST/PwBD/Women is 5 years, for OBC is 3 years)
age_limit.details: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 05 years OBC: 03 years

qualification.education_qualification: Bachelor's Degree in Fisheries Science /Marine Biology / Biotechnology / Biochemistry. Master's Degree in Fish Processing Technology / Marine Biology / Biochemistry/Biotechnology preferred.
qualification.details: Project Assistant: Bachelor's Degree in Fisheries Science /Marine Biology / Biotechnology / Biochemistry from a recognized University. Hands-on expertise in protein/peptide purification, biochemical analysis. Master's Degree in Fish Processing Technology / Marine Biology / Biochemistry/Biotechnology will be preferred.

how_to_apply: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR CFTRI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026.
Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026.
To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section.
Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CFTRI to complete the application.
Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details.
Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format.
Pay the application fee online, if applicable.
Review all details carefully before submitting the form.
Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the CSIR CFTRI Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. CSIR CFTRI Project Assistant Eligibility Criteria 2026
content_sections.text: Project Assistant: Bachelor's Degree in Fisheries Science /Marine Biology / Biotechnology / Biochemistry from a recognized University. Hands-on expertise in protein/peptide purification, biochemical analysis. Master's Degree in Fish Processing Technology / Marine Biology / Biochemistry/Biotechnology will be preferred.

rows.fee: No application fee is mentioned in the official notification.

content_sections.text: Maximum Age Limit: 35 years Age Relaxation: SC/ST/PwBD/Women: 05 years OBC: 03 years

content_sections.heading: CSIR CFTRI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Dates
CSIR CFTRI Project Assistant Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who meet the eligibility criteria can apply online for the CSIR CFTRI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026. Applications must be submitted online on or before 05-07-2026. To apply directly, use the Apply Online link provided in the Important Links section. Alternatively, candidates may visit the official website of CSIR CFTRI to complete the application. Fill out the application form carefully with correct personal, educational, and contact details. Upload required documents such as photograph, signature, and certificates in the prescribed format. Pay the application fee online, if applicable. Review all details carefully before submitting the form. Take a printout or save a copy of the submitted application for future reference.

content_sections.heading: CSIR CFTRI Project Assistant Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the Project Assistant position at CSIR CFTRI?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your online application for the Project Assistant position at CSIR CFTRI is 05 July 2026. Ensure you apply well before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the educational qualification required for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a Bachelor's Degree in Fisheries Science, Marine Biology, Biotechnology, or Biochemistry. A Master's Degree in Fish Processing Technology, Marine Biology, Biochemistry, or Biotechnology is preferred.

faq.question: Q3. What is the age limit for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The maximum age limit for the Project Assistant position is 35 years. Age relaxations are applicable for SC/ST/PwBD/Women and OBC categories.

faq.question: Q4. How many vacancies are available for the Project Assistant post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy for the Project Assistant position as per the official notification released by CSIR CFTRI.

faq.question: Q5. What is the salary offered for the Project Assistant role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Project Assistant position will receive a salary of Rs. 27,000/- per month, plus House Rent Allowance (HRA).

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Project Assistant recruitment?
faq.answer: The selection process involves two stages: initial shortlisting by a designated committee, followed by an interview for the shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: Q7. Is there any application fee for the Project Assistant position?
faq.answer: The official notification does not mention any application fee for the Project Assistant position. Candidates are advised to check the official notification for any updates.

faq.question: Q8. What type of job is this recruitment?
faq.answer: This is a project-based engagement, meaning the position is temporary and contractual, tied to the duration of a specific research project.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification PDF can be downloaded from the "Important Links" section of this article. It is also available on the CSIR CFTRI official website.

faq.question: Q10. What is the location of the CSIR CFTRI?
faq.answer: CSIR CFTRI is located in Mysuru, Karnataka, with the pincode 570020.
